CREATE TABLE users (id HUGEINT, username VARCHAR(50), email VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id HUGEINT, user_id HUGEINT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT u.username, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.username;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders));
SELECT o.order_id, o.amount FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = o.user_id AND u.username LIKE 'jane%');
SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id, MIN(id) AS min_id FROM users WHERE id > (SELECT MIN(id) FROM users WHERE username LIKE 'j%');
CREATE TABLE product (product_id HUGEINT, name VARCHAR(100), price DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT p.name, p.price FROM product p WHERE p.price < (SELECT AVG(price) FROM product);
SELECT u.username, o.order_id, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount BETWEEN 100 AND 300 ORDER BY o.amount DESC;
CREATE TABLE inventory (product_id HUGEINT, quantity HUGEINT);
SELECT p.name, i.quantity FROM product p JOIN inventory i ON p.product_id = i.product_id WHERE i.quantity < (SELECT MAX(quantity) FROM inventory);
